subject:
Re: EER files do not update with recursive search in Warp 1.1.0
 Beta
body:
Hi Daniel,

Is this happening only if you point it to EER files in that location? 
Generally, some Linux FS setups still cause the file discovery mechanism to 
break from time to time. Hard to debug without access to such a setup.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Sunday, September 18, 2022 at 1:16:37 AM UTC+5 d.m...@fz-juelich.de 
wrote:

> Hi all,
>
> love the new Ukraine themed Warp Version, but it's giving me some problems 
> with EER files from FalconIV/EPU.
>
> When I'm using recursive processing with EPUs GridSquare*/Data/*eer format 
> it finds initial images and processes them fine when pointed to the 
> Images-Disc1 folder. However, the file list is not updating although new 
> images keep flying in. When I stop processing and refresh the folder 
> manually it finds the new images. My processing folder is different from my 
> data folder.
>
> When I untick the "Search recursively" option and go to the 
> Gridsquare*/Data/ folder it keeps updating and works fine on-the-fly.
>
> Of course this can be fixed with some quick linux mv commands, but I still 
> wanted to report it.
>
> Cheers,
>
> Dan
>
> -- 
> Dr. Daniel Mann
>
> Forschungszentrum Jülich GmbH
> Ernst-Ruska Centre for Microscopy and Spectroscopy with Electrons / ER-C-3 Structural Biology
> Institute for Biological Information Processing / IBI-6 Cellular Structural Biology
> Wilhem-Johnen-Straße, 52425 Jülich, Germany
